articles.description: Moments after winning the Masters last year, Rory McIlroy said it would be transformative. He has proved that by defending the title at Augusta National.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Rory McIlroy creates more Augusta history with back-to-back victory

articles.description: Manchester City capitalise on Arsenal's latest slip-up in style - and now Pep Guardiola's side must be feared as the Premier League title race hots up.
articles.title: Chelsea 0-3 Man City: Pep Guardiola's side looking ominous in title race

articles.description: Cristian Romero's tears at Sunderland could prove the lasting image of Tottenham's season if it ends with relegation, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Sunderland 1-0 Tottenham: Cristian Romero's tears as Spurs edge towards drop

articles.description: Rory McIlroy says "I don't want to stop here" after emerging victorious from a rollercoaster final round to retain the Masters and match European great Sir Nick Faldo's haul of six major titles.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy: Back-to-back Masters champion wants more majors as European record nears

articles.description: Rangers' 6-3 win over Falkirk extends the Ibrox side's advantage over leaders Heart of Midlothian and Celtic should the Scottish Premiership title be decided on goal difference.
articles.title: Will Scottish Premiership be decided on goal difference?

articles.description: Eddie Howe says he is "accountable" for Newcastle's defeat by Crystal Palace after three weeks without a game.
articles.title: Crystal Palace 2-1 Newcastle: Howe rapidly approaching crossroads

articles.description: BBC Sport NI looks back on the moments that won Rory McIlroy the 2026 Masters, his second title at Augusta National.
articles.title: The Masters 2026: The five key shots in Rory McIlroy's second Augusta victory

articles.description: Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is getting closer to agreeing a new contract with the club, head coach Michael Carrick says.
articles.title: Kobbie Mainoo closer to agreeing new Man Utd deal says Michael Carrick

articles.description: Jannik Sinner is back to world number one after beating Carlos Alcaraz in the final in Monte Carlo.
articles.title: Monte Carlo Masters: Jannik Sinner beats Carlos Alcaraz to return to world top spot

articles.description: Wout van Aert beats four-time Tour de France champion Tadej Pogacar in a thrilling sprint finish to win the Paris-Roubaix title.
articles.title: Paris-Roubaix 2026: Wout Van Aert beats Tadej Pogacar in sprint finish
